properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 70/19BARENTS SEA
SEISMIC SURVEY WILL BE CARRIED OUT FROM 15 JULI TO 31 OCTBER BY SEISMIC VESSEL OCEANIC SIRIUS CS LCHS3, TOWING 16 X 8000 METERS LONG CABLES IN SURVEY AREA BOUNDED BY: 
 
A. 72- 56,1 N 019-15,1 E
B. 72-51,3 N 020-44,0 E 
C. 72-24,7 N 020-44,3 E
D. 72-18,2 N 020-59,5 E
E. 72-09,3 N 020-50,9 E
F. 72-15,9 N 018-15,9 E 
G. 72-31,1 N 018-38,4 E
 
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, 3 NM AHEAD AND ABEAM. 7 NM ASTERN.
SUPPORT VESSELS GEO CORAL, BOURBON PETREL AND BOURBON TERN IN ATTENDANCE
